hooks.command: node -e "const{existsSync}=require('fs'),{dirname,join}=require('path');let d=process.cwd(),p;while(!existsSync(p=join(d,'.codex','hooks','user-prompt-submit.js'))&&dirname(d)!==d)d=dirname(d);if(!existsSync(p))throw Error('HookPrompt project hook not found above '+process.cwd());require(p)"
